text.title: HealthTech FHIR BA Pack Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid HealthTech FHIR BA Pack output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

forbidden.pattern: baa_or_dpa missing AND PHI in scope

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: fhir_resource_map populated with a typed value
baa_or_dpa populated with a typed value
irb_protocol_id populated with a typed value
audit_log_spec populated with a typed value
minimum_necessary_policy populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
